remarks: Welcome to Park Tower, one of Downtown Stamford's premier luxury condominium residences. This beautifully maintained one-bedroom, one-and-a-half-bath home offers the perfect combination of luxury, comfort, and convenience in the heart of downtown. Featuring hardwood floors throughout, rich dark oak cabinetry, elegant marble countertops, stainless steel appliances, and an in-unit washer and dryer, every detail has been thoughtfully designed for modern living. The spacious primary suite includes a private full bath, while the additional half bath is perfect for guests. The home also includes a private storage unit and the ability to lease one parking space. Residents enjoy exceptional full-service amenities including a 24-hour concierge, doorman, indoor heated pool, fitness center, sauna, community room, and beautifully maintained common areas. Just steps from Stamford's award-winning restaurants, shopping, theaters, nightlife, Mill River Park, and the Metro-North train station with direct service to New York City, this location offers the ultimate walkable lifestyle. Whether you're searching for a primary residence, weekend retreat, or investment opportunity, this move-in-ready luxury condo delivers everything today's buyer is looking for in one of Downtown Stamford's most sought-after buildings.
